resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Set a new password for your account
resetPassword.minLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
resetPassword.failed: Failed to reset password. The link may have expired.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.invalidMessage: This password reset link is invalid, has expired, or has already been used. Please request a new link from your administrator.
